description: A photograph shows five black and white cows grazing in a vibrant green agricultural grassland. A thin, wire fence runs across the lower third of the image. The field is covered in lush green grass. In the background, a line of trees is visible, and a farm building or barn with a dark roof is partially obscured on the left. The sky is overcast. Visible text at the bottom left corner reads "Diksmade uden, 2012" and "LUKAS".
